config.note: A11y-cell snapshot, loop-2 (badge-aware perception) — real iPad mini 7 n=5 Settings drill-down, Voice Control Item-Names overlay ON, producer writing vc:item-name ids AND subtracting badge elements from the perceived scene. vs loop-1 (the committed 0.0 baseline, code ac58ab6, identical command): task_completion 0.0 -> 1.0 (5/5), action_success 0.42 -> 0.87, unknown 0.41 -> 0.11, root_pages_coverage 0.13 -> 1.0, strategy_switches 21 -> 1, recoveries 7 -> 0 (honest zero: nothing needed rescue), scenes carrying vc ids 351 -> 1167. The single delta was the perception-layer badge subtraction (94fa2fd) — the overlay is now BOTH a working identity channel AND a survivable environment. Still never a floor candidate (cell is rejected from clean-floor promotion by design). Generator: GLASSBOX_PHONE_MODEL=ipad_mini_7 GLASSBOX_ICON_DETECTOR=classical GLASSBOX_VOICE_CONTROL_OVERLAY_HINTS_ENABLED=1 run-ios-settings --rounds 5 --drill-down --language en --region HK --keep-going --evaluation-cell ios_settings_a11y_voice_control.
